description: Narrative structures and storytelling techniques optimized for short-form video

rules.title: PAS: Problem-Agitate-Solution is the #1 Short-Form Structure
rules.description: Problem (0-5s): state the pain. Agitate (5-15s): make it worse, show consequences. Solution (15-end): reveal the answer. PAS achieves 68% completion rate vs 41% for chronological structure. Works across all niches and markets.

rules.title: Open Loop: Create a Question the Brain Must Answer
rules.description: Opening with an unresolved question or tension that only the video can answer forces completion. The brain physically cannot ignore an open pattern. Best loops: 'The reason I almost quit…', 'What happened next changed everything', 'I never expected this'. Close the loop explicitly at the end.

rules.title: Micro 3-Act Structure for 30-60s Videos
rules.description: Act 1 (0-8s): hook + context. Act 2 (8-40s): conflict/tension/journey. Act 3 (40-60s): resolution + CTA. Videos following micro-3-act get 2.3x higher share rate and 1.8x more saves. The structure is universal — humans are wired for it.

rules.title: Start In The Middle of the Action
rules.description: In medias res (starting mid-action without context) is the #1 scroll-stopping narrative technique. Drop viewer into the peak moment, then rewind to explain. 'I was in the middle of [intense situation] when…' Retention at 3s is 89% vs 61% for setup-first.

recommendation.hook_template: I was in the middle of [intense situation] when…

rules.title: Pattern Interrupt Every 7-10 Seconds
rules.description: Attention drops every 7-10 seconds without a new stimulus. Insert a pattern interrupt (new angle, text overlay, sound change, cut) every 7-10s to reset attention. Videos with regular pattern interrupts have 34% higher average watch percentage.

rules.title: Stack Multiple Payoffs to Prevent Drop-Off
rules.description: Instead of one big payoff at the end, stack 3 smaller payoffs throughout the video (at ~20%, ~60%, ~100% mark). Each mini-payoff rewards watching and creates anticipation for the next. Reduces drop-off by 41% compared to single-payoff structure.

rules.title: Specific Details Create Perceived Authenticity
rules.description: Specific, concrete details ('I lost 23 lbs in 67 days' vs 'I lost a lot of weight') increase perceived credibility by 2.8x and drive 44% more saves. Vague claims trigger skepticism. The more precise the detail, the more authentic it feels.

examples.vague: I lost a lot of weight

rules.title: Cliffhanger Endings Drive Part 2 Follow
rules.description: Ending with 'Part 2 tomorrow' or a genuine unresolved cliffhanger converts 4.7x more followers than complete standalone videos. Series content builds daily return viewers. Part 2 receives avg 61% of Part 1 views on same-day posts, 38% next-day.
